parts.text:
Call project_to_erp with this document JSON and systems ["qbs", "xero"] only, then summarize the row counts per ERP:
{"doc_type":"purchase","document_kind":"invoice","vendor_name":"Acme Supplies Pte Ltd","customer_name":"","entity_tax_id":"201234567M","invoice_number":"INV-1001","invoice_date":"2026-01-15","due_date":"2026-02-14","currency":"SGD","fx_rate":null,"subtotal":100.0,"tax_total":9.0,"grand_total":109.0,"lines":[{"description":"Office paper","quantity":2,"unit_amount":50.0,"net_amount":100.0,"tax_amount":9.0,"total_amount":109.0}],"notes":""}

Use the light document path on ${LEDGR_TEST_DOC_DIR}/Cast Unity/Auditair International Pte. Ltd./Purchase/FY2026/Tax Invoice #11861 Audit for ISO.pdf: call read_document with paths=["${LEDGR_TEST_DOC_DIR}/Cast Unity/Auditair International Pte. Ltd./Purchase/FY2026/Tax Invoice #11861 Audit for ISO.pdf"], then project_to_erp for all four ERPs (qbs, xero, autocount, sql_account). Summarize vendor name, invoice number, grand total, and the QBS row Sub Total and Total.
